/usr/bin/ar qc libocudu_channel_precoder.a CMakeFiles/ocudu_channel_precoder.dir/channel_precoder_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_channel_precoder.dir/channel_precoder_generic.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_channel_precoder.dir/precoding_factories.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_channel_precoder.dir/channel_precoder_avx2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_channel_precoder.dir/channel_precoder_avx512.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libocudu_channel_precoder.a
